---
title: "MSE docs"
output: html_document
---

 <!-- ADD LINKS BELOW, note, using the RMD link syntax will open the presentation in the same tab, which is annoying. Use the html with the "_blank" to fix that behavior -->
 
<button>
    <a href="https://github.com/sgaichas/MAB-Rpath"> Sarah's forked MAB-Rpath repo </a>
</button>

## MSE pages

<a href="https://sgaichas.github.io/MAB-Rpath/MAB_MSE_test.html" target="_blank">Initial MSE testing - June 18 2026</a>
